# Task: Hello, World!

## Objective

Write a bash script that prints exactly `Hello, World!` to standard output.

## Requirements

- Edit `solution.sh` so that when executed via `bash solution.sh`, it prints exactly:
  ```
  Hello, World!
  ```
- The output must match exactly (case-sensitive, including punctuation).
- The script must exit with code 0.

## Files

- `solution.sh` — the script you must edit
